channel.title: Source Themes on Dr. Chuan-Peng Hu (胡传鹏)
channel.description: Recent content in Source Themes on Dr. Chuan-Peng Hu (胡传鹏)

item.title: Distinct and common aspects of physical and psychological self-representation in the brain: A meta-analysis of self-bias in facial and self-referential judgements
item.description: Supplementary notes can be added here, including code and math.
